problem: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function?
mechanism: Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing
hypothesis: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Fear. Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 28 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
